description: Letter from Avraham Hamān and Gavriel Ḥefez to Karo y Frances & Company. Dated: 1 Elul, 5568 AM, which is 1808 CE. (Someone wrote the date 1708 CE on the fragment because they read the century digit as a ת, but it is a ק, with the initial הת implied.)
tags: Late JA, Karo y Frances, Haman & Hefez
description_he: מכתב מאברהם המאן וגבריאל חפץ לקארו וי פרנסס ושות'. תאריך: 1 אלול ה'תקס'ח (1808 לספירה).
